text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp—it's the season for many
inexperienced racers to make leaps and bounds in
their development.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: S-summer camp?! This is bad, Trainer. Really bad!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well... summer camp is, like, peak awkward
situation time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Like going swimming together in your bathing
suits, sharing a bottle of ramune, wearing yukata
and watching fireworks...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And then, at the end, the two of them.... Gaaah!
However you put it, th-that's just too much!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, sorry. I let my fantasies... I mean, my
imagination, run wild.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've just never experienced this kind of thing
before. I've been focused on nothing but sports
my whole life.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And that's why I was imagining all the different
possibilities... Aaahh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She can't stop fidgeting with worry. It's like she
has a mistaken impression of what summer camp
is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What if I meet someone? What am I supposed to
do?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Coach me, Trainer! I don't know how to hold a
conversation that isn't about lifting and gettin'
ripped!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a tall hurdle, but this might be a good
opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Classic in spring was fierce. Now, I want her
to enjoy a nice change of pace during camp.
